purpose: Detailed protocol for how workers populate their progress files: when to write (mandatory points: stage transitions, deviations, errors, completion), what to include (status, stage, message, milestones, deviations, logs, files_changed, annotations), and how the dashboard renders each field. Complements the schema reference in data-architecture/progress-files.md with operational guidance.
gotchas: Logs should narrate the worker's reasoning, not just announce 'starting' / 'done'
files_changed must be populated incrementally as files are touched, not just at the end
patterns: Full-file overwrite per write (no partial JSON updates)
conventions: summary field is descriptive on completion (e.g. 'Created auth middleware with rate limiting -- 3 endpoints')
